tasks.subject: Task 0: Install Vercel AI SDK Dependencies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install Vercel AI SDK and Google provider packages

**Files:**
- Modify: `package.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `ai` package (Vercel AI SDK v6) installed
- `@ai-sdk/google` package installed
- `npm run dev` starts without errors

**Verify:** `npm ls ai @ai-sdk/google` → shows both packages installed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm ls ai @ai-sdk/google", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ai package installed", "@ai-sdk/google package installed", "npm run dev starts without errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Create AI SDK Provider Configuration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Set up Vercel AI SDK provider for Google Gemini

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/ai/ai-sdk-provider.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Exports `googleProvider` configured with GEMINI_API_KEY
- Exports `geminiModel` ready for use with streamText
- Handles missing API key gracefully

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit lib/ai/ai-sdk-provider.ts` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/ai/ai-sdk-provider.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit lib/ai/ai-sdk-provider.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Exports googleProvider configured with GEMINI_API_KEY", "Exports geminiModel ready for streamText", "Handles missing API key gracefully"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Create Match Explanation Prompt
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create a structured prompt for explaining job match scores

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/ai/prompts/match-explain.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- System prompt instructs AI to explain match in conversational style
- User prompt template includes resume skills, job skills, match scores, missing skills
- Output is natural language, not JSON

**Verify:** File exports `MATCH_EXPLAIN_SYSTEM_PROMPT` and `getMatchExplainUserPrompt` function

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/ai/prompts/match-explain.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit lib/ai/prompts/match-explain.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["System prompt for conversational explanation", "User prompt with match data template", "Natural language output"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Create Streaming Match Explanation API Route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create API endpoint that streams match explanation text

**Files:**
- Create: `app/api/matches/explain/stream/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- POST endpoint accepts match data (jobTitle, scores, skills)
- Uses Vercel AI SDK `streamText()` with `toTextStreamResponse()`
- Handles missing API key with mock streaming response

**Verify:** `curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/matches/explain/stream ...` → streams text

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/matches/explain/stream/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "curl test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST endpoint with validation", "Uses streamText + toTextStreamResponse", "Mock fallback when no API key"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Create useStreamingText Hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create a reusable React hook for consuming streaming text responses

**Files:**
- Create: `hooks/useStreamingText.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Hook accepts API endpoint URL and request body
- Returns `{ text, isLoading, error, trigger, stop, reset }`
- Handles plain text streams from toTextStreamResponse()
- Supports abort/cancel mid-stream

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit hooks/useStreamingText.ts` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["hooks/useStreamingText.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit hooks/useStreamingText.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Returns text, isLoading, error, trigger, stop, reset", "Handles plain text streaming", "Supports abort"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Create MatchExplanationStream Component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create a React component that displays streaming match explanation

**Files:**
- Create: `components/smart-feed/MatchExplanationStream.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Client component that triggers streaming on button click
- Shows loading state while streaming
- Displays text as it streams in (typewriter effect)
- Follows terminal design system (mono font, orange accents)
- Has stop/regenerate buttons

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit components/smart-feed/MatchExplanationStream.tsx` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/smart-feed/MatchExplanationStream.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit components/smart-feed/MatchExplanationStream.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Client component with streaming", "Terminal design system styling", "Stop/regenerate buttons"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Create Streaming Cover Letter API Route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create API endpoint that streams cover letter generation

**Files:**
- Create: `app/api/resume/cover-letter/stream/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- POST endpoint accepts resumeText, jobTitle, companyName, jobDescription, tone
- Uses Vercel AI SDK `streamText()` with `toTextStreamResponse()`
- Handles missing API key with mock streaming response

**Verify:** `curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/resume/cover-letter/stream ...` → streams cover letter text

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/resume/cover-letter/stream/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "curl test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST endpoint with validation", "Uses streamText + toTextStreamResponse", "Mock fallback when no API key"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Create CoverLetterStream Component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create a React component for streaming cover letter generation

**Files:**
- Create: `components/smart-feed/CoverLetterStream.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Client component that accepts resume text and job details
- Triggers streaming on button click
- Shows loading state, streaming text, and completion state
- Includes copy-to-clipboard button when complete
- Tone selector (professional/enthusiastic/creative/technical)
- Follows terminal design system

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit components/smart-feed/CoverLetterStream.tsx` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/smart-feed/CoverLetterStream.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit components/smart-feed/CoverLetterStream.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Client component with streaming", "Tone selector", "Copy to clipboard", "Terminal design system styling"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Integration Test - Wire Components to Test Page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify streaming components work end-to-end

**Files:**
- Create: `app/test-streaming/page.tsx` (test page)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- MatchExplanationStream renders with mock data and streams explanation
- CoverLetterStream renders with mock data and streams cover letter
- Both components follow terminal design system
- Dev server runs without errors

**Verify:** Visit `http://localhost:3000/test-streaming` → trigger both streams, see text appear word-by-word

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/test-streaming/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev + manual test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Both streaming components render", "Streaming works visually", "No console errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Final Verification and Documentation Update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify all features work end-to-end and update CLAUDE.md

**Files:**
- Modify: `CLAUDE.md` (update roadmap status)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `npm run build` passes
- All new API routes respond correctly
- Streaming works in production build (`npm run start`)
- CLAUDE.md reflects completed streaming features

**Verify:** `npm run build && npm run start` → visit test page → streaming works

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Build passes", "Production server works", "CLAUDE.md updated"]}
```
